howItWorks.intro: This platinum price calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Platinum Value = Weight (troy oz) × Spot Price
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Is platinum more valuable than gold?
faq.answer: Historically platinum was more expensive than gold, but since 2015 gold has generally been priced higher. Platinum currently trades around $1,000/oz vs gold at ~$2,350/oz.

howWeCalculate.intro: This platinum price calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
